# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://anotherdomain.com"
      methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers:
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
      credentials: true
    run_on: "first"
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - "apikey"
      hide_credentials: true
    run_on: "first"
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"
    run_on: "first"
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: "http://example-service.local"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - "https://service-specific.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
          headers:
            - "Authorization"
            - "Content-Type"
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - "service-apikey"
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 500
          policy: "local"
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths:
      - "/example"
    service: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - "https://route-specific.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
          headers:
            - "Authorization"
            - "Content-Type"
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - "route-apikey"
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 20
          hour: 200
          policy: "local"
        enabled: true
